name: offboard_worker
description: Initiate the offboarding process for an employee or terminate a contractor agreement. Deel handles country-specific notice periods, final payments, and compliance requirements automatically.

parameters.name: contract_id
parameters.description: The ID of the contract to terminate.

parameters.name: termination_date
parameters.description: Effective date of termination (YYYY-MM-DD). Must respect country-specific notice periods.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.example: Project completed successfully. May rehire for future work.

body.notes: Project completed successfully. May rehire for future work.
